issues.title: Remix Flights require real-player fairness and replay validation
issues.workaround: Use the v1.6 closed test to measure modifier comprehension, route completion, retries, abandonment, and voluntary second-route starts before production approval.

issues.title: Phone and compact-landscape gameplay layout could stretch controls or hide secondary surfaces
issues.workaround: Deploy v1.4.5 or later. The mobile layout now uses a board-first named grid, contained overlays, and a dedicated landscape control rail.

issues.title: Some secondary mobile controls were below the 44-pixel touch-target objective
issues.workaround: Deploy v1.4.5 or later. Mobile primary and secondary actions now meet the configured target minimum.

issues.title: v1.4.1 could enter startup recovery because the mastery-goal HUD node was absent
issues.workaround: Deploy v1.4.2. Existing schema-12 saves and backups remain compatible.

issues.title: Sound defaults to on for new or reset player profiles
issues.workaround: Existing explicit sound choices are preserved. Browsers begin audio only after a player interaction, and sound can be disabled at any time in Settings.

issues.title: Progress is stored only on the current device and browser
issues.workaround: Use Backup app data before changing devices, browsers, or site domains.

issues.title: iPhone and iPad installation uses Safari Add to Home Screen
issues.workaround: Open in Safari, then Share → Add to Home Screen.

issues.title: Feedback and diagnostics are downloaded rather than uploaded
issues.workaround: Send the downloaded JSON file through the creator's configured support channel.

issues.title: Public support contact must be configured before production
Accessibility certification still requires five physical reports
issues.workaround: Run ?a11ycert=1 for keyboard, VoiceOver, TalkBack, text scaling, and contrast, then import all reports.

issues.title: Production publisher, support contact, and canonical URL are not configured
Paper Flock 1.6.0 production approval requires matching CI, device, and alpha-readiness evidence
issues.workaround: Push v1.6.0, require all release and CodeQL jobs to pass, verify Android and iPhone play, then review the simulated-player findings before closed-alpha recruitment.

issues.title: Normal browser tabs may still show browser address and navigation controls
issues.workaround: Install Paper Flock to the Home Screen for the most game-like standalone viewport.

issues.title: Existing saved players are not forced through the new tutorial
issues.workaround: Open More and choose How to play, or add ?tutorial=1 to the game URL.

issues.title: Daily Flock rotates through validated campaign layouts
issues.workaround: Daily Flock may revisit a campaign layout on a later date; its progress and feathers remain separate.

issues.title: Detailed move and hint totals begin with v1.4
issues.workaround: Campaign, mastery, feather, theme, and Daily milestones are reconstructed from existing saves; detailed lifetime interaction totals accumulate from v1.4 onward.
